name: google-play-scraper-ts
description: TypeScript rewrite of google-play-scraper with throttling, retries, and strong typing.
author: Guiguito

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:esm && node scripts/postbuild-esm.js && npm run build:cjs
scripts.test: npm run build && node node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha --require tests/setup.js "tests/*.spec.js" "tests/**/*.spec.js" "tests/**/*.spec.ts"
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build:cjs && node node_modules/nyc/bin/nyc.js node node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha --require tests/setup.js "tests/*.spec.js" "tests/**/*.spec.js" "tests/**/*.spec.ts"
scripts.verify:types: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --module ES2020 --moduleResolution node --lib es2020,dom --types node --noEmit tests/types/usage.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
scripts.release:preflight: npm run lint && npm test && npm run verify:types
scripts.release:patch: npm run release:preflight && npm version patch -m "chore(release): %s" && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm run release:preflight && npm version minor -m "chore(release): %s" && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm run release:preflight && npm version major -m "chore(release): %s" && npm publish --access public
